            "min": 150,
            "max": 450

          "half_day": {
            "min": 350,
            "max": 750
          },

            "min": 650,
            "max": 1200
          },
          "multi_day": {
            "min": 0,
            "max": 0,
            "note": "requires_formal_quote"
          }
        },
        "travelModifiers": {
          "core": {
            "surcharge": 0,
            "label": "Local / core service area"
          },
          "extended": {
            "surcharge": 40,
            "label": "Extended area travel"
          },
          "outside": {
            "surcharge": 0,
            "decline": true,
            "label": "Outside service area"
          }
        },
        "categoryModifiers": {},
        "complexityModifiers": {
          "2_story": {
            "factor": 1.15,
            "label": "Two-storey access"
          },
          "tricky_access": {
            "factor": 1.2,
            "label": "Difficult / restricted access"
          }
        },
        "urgencyModifiers": {
          "emergency": {
            "premiumPct": 50,
            "label": "Emergency response"
          },
          "urgent": {
            "premiumPct": 25,
            "label": "Urgent / after-hours"
          },
          "next_week": {
            "premiumPct": 0,
            "label": "Next week"
          },
          "next_2_weeks": {
            "premiumPct": 0,
            "label": "Next fortnight"
          },
          "flexible": {
            "premiumPct": 0,
            "label": "Flexible timing"
          },
          "when_convenient": {
            "premiumPct": 0,
            "label": "When convenient"
          },
          "unspecified": {
            "premiumPct": 0,
            "label": "Unspecified"
          }
        },
        "minimumCallout": {
          "amount": 120,
          "label": "Minimum call-out"
        },
        "contingencyBands": {
          "repeatVisible": 5,
          "firstTimeVisible": 10,
          "moderateHidden": 20,
          "highUncertainty": "formal_quote"
        },

          "standardPct": 15,
          "specialOrderPct": 27
        },

          "hrCapacity": 1,
          "notes": "One-man team. Work requiring a second person, rigging/scaffolding, or more than a day routes to a formal quote rather than an auto ROM."
        },
        "presentation": {
          "roundTo": 10,
          "rangeLabel": "Typically",
          "disclaimer": "Ballpark estimate only — not a formal quote. Final price is confirmed on site once access and scope are verified."
